data.name: Enterprise Knowledge Assistant (RAG)
data.description: Built an enterprise-grade RAG platform with document ingestion, chunking, embedding generation, and semantic retrieval using FAISS/Qdrant. Used Celery and Redis for async processing; deployed via Docker for production readiness.

data.name: AI Clothing Platform
data.description: Fine-tuned a custom Stable Diffusion model on Shalwar Kameez patterns for culturally-specific traditional garment generation. Rendered AI-generated designs on an interactive 3D avatar pipeline for real-time garment visualization.

data.name: AI-Powered Recipe Generator
data.description: Orchestrated LLaMA and Gemini models to generate custom culinary recipes with secure auth and persistent account-based storage.

data.name: Distributed Real Estate Scraper
data.description: Engineered a multithreaded scraper with socket-based communication; integrated local LLMs for intelligent summarization and NL query handling.

data.name: Fire Station Coverage Optimization
data.description: Engineered a pipeline integrating population rasters and road networks to model accessibility gaps; applied spatial clustering and MCLP optimization to strategically site fire stations and maximize emergency coverage for high-risk zones.

data.name: Online Car Auction
data.description: Real-time bidding platform with secure authentication and integrated chat.

data.name: ML Implementations
data.description: MNIST classifier from scratch (NumPy) and Tiny-VGG (PyTorch) for image classification.

data.name: Mobile Ecosystem
data.description: Weather, Driving Tracker, and Fitness apps using cloud APIs and monetization strategies.
